title: Dogfood worker-pane Pi prompt for ask_operator
goal: Prove a native Khazad-Doom Pi worker opens ask_operator as a real Pi prompt in the same worker pane, records the answer through daemon state, and resumes. Before making any file changes, the worker must call ask_operator with the exact question: "For ASK-OPERATOR-PI-UI-01, which marker should I record in the proof document?" and options ["worker-pane-blue", "worker-pane-green"]. After receiving the answer, create the proof document that records the answer and what was changed.
acceptance: A real native Pi worker calls ask_operator for the marker choice before writing the proof document.
The operator answers through the Pi prompt displayed in the worker pane; the Dashboard/monitor bridge is not the answer surface.
Daemon worker question state records the answer through answerQuestion, the worker resumes, and the proof document records the operator answer.
must_ask_if: Before choosing the marker value, ask the operator via ask_operator with the exact question and options stated in the goal; do not infer or choose a default marker.
If ask_operator is unavailable, cancelled, or times out, return blocked JSON with an ask-user finding instead of writing the proof document.
